js_006: Closer the more you know each other 🧡
js_008: Meet up face-to-face at least once a month
js_009: Remember one thing they’re into lately, then ask about it
js_010: When you’re grateful, don’t put off your “thank you”
js_011: When they’re venting, listen all the way through — no judging
js_012: Keep even the small promises and build trust
js_013: The easier you click, the easier it is to take each other for granted. The closer you are, the less you should hold back your “thank you”s and “sorry”s.
js_014: Different personalities cause mix-ups — but that’s not wrong, just different. Get curious about the differences instead of teasing them, and your friendship only gets stronger.
js_021: Say one loving thing once a day
js_022: Don’t let hurt pile up — bring it up gently the same day
js_023: Book time for just the two of you once a week
js_024: Show love the way they like to receive it
js_025: Name exactly what you’re grateful for
js_026: The more alike and comfy you are, the easier the spark gets buried under routine. Try something new together now and then to bring back those first butterflies.
js_027: What charms you now can become the seed of a fight later. Swap “why are they like that” for “that’s why I love them,” and the fire lasts longer.
js_033: Great when you look out for each other 🧡
js_035: Check in with each other once a day
js_036: Ask how they feel before you nag
js_037: Say “thanks” even for the small help
js_038: Accept each other’s differences instead of fixing them
js_039: Make time to share a meal once a month
js_040: Being family makes it easy — and easy to get harsh with your words. Even the closest bond needs manners and respect.
js_041: Clashing over different generations or temperaments doesn’t mean the love is gone. Home gets cozier when you accept each other as-is instead of trying to change them.
js_058: What recharges you on a weekend?
js_059: Being around people, loud and lively
js_062: Break the ice and get things going
js_063: Hang back and wait for others to come to me
js_065: I talk it out with people to sort it
js_066: I mull it over on my own
js_067: See something new — what pulls you in?
js_068: The concrete how-to of using it now
js_069: The big picture of what it’ll change
js_070: In conversation, I mostly go for…
js_074: Name the landmarks and steps exactly
js_075: Point the rough direction and vibe
js_076: When someone says they’re struggling, I first…
js_077: Look for a way to fix the problem
js_081: How I and the people around me feel
js_083: Say it straight, just as it is
js_084: Soften it so it doesn’t sting
js_085: Planning a trip or a date, I…
js_086: Map the schedule out in advance, tight
js_087: Go with whatever I feel in the moment
js_089: Feel better getting it done early
js_090: Focus best as the deadline closes in
js_093: A little messy, but I’ve got my own order
js_094:
Whoever goes first, start answering.
12 questions — honestly, from the heart 🙂
js_096: Halfway there! Your type is taking shape ✨
js_097: You’re both outgoing — get together and the talk and laughter never stop.
js_098: You’re both easygoing — comfortable side by side, even in silence.
js_099: One of you recharges out in the world, the other from within. After time together, give each other some downtime and neither of you burns out.
js_100: You’ve both got a good feel for reality — your plans line right up.
js_101: You both love imagination and meaning — your talks run deep and wide.
js_102: One of you sees the facts, the other the possibilities. Ask “what do you mean?” often and the mix-ups shrink.
js_103: You’re both logical — even when you clash, you fix it fast by focusing on the problem.
js_104: You both read each other’s feelings and take care not to hurt one another.
js_105: One of you wants solutions, the other wants empathy. Ask first: “Want advice, or should I just listen?”
js_106: You’re both planners — your dates and schedules fit together easily.
js_107: You’re both free spirits — even winging it turns into a blast.
js_108: One of you likes a plan, the other likes to improvise. Set the big frame, leave the details open, and you’ll both be happy.
js_109: Opposites on the surface — which is exactly why you fill in what the other’s missing, like two magnets.
js_110: All four axes match — you’re the soulmate type. It’s cozy, so chase new thrills together to keep it fun for the long haul.
js_114: Closeness 100%! Today is where it really begins 💖
